entryTerms.title: Entry Terms — Replay Club
entryTerms.intro: Welcome to Replay Club. This is a quick summary of what you're agreeing to when you apply for a session. For the full terms, see our Studio Policies, Cancellation Policy, and Code of Conduct.
entryTerms.application: Sessions at Replay Club are by application. Submitting an application doesn't confirm a booking — we review every request personally and respond within 24 hours. Your payment method is collected at the time of application but is not charged unless we approve your session. If we're unable to accommodate your request, your card is not charged.
entryTerms.time: Sessions start and end at the times confirmed in your approval email. We recommend a 2-hour minimum booking to make the most of your session.
entryTerms.cancellation: Plans change. Full details are in our Cancellation Policy, but the short version: cancellations 48+ hours in advance receive a full refund minus a processing fee, cancellations 24-48 hours in advance receive a 50% refund, and cancellations under 24 hours or no-shows are non-refundable.
entryTerms.arrival: Once approved, you'll receive an email with the meeting point, arrival time, and host contact. Your host meets you at the meeting point and walks you in. The physical studio address is private — please do not share, post, or disclose location details about the space.
entryTerms.respectSpace: Replay Club is a curated, private environment. Treat the studio, the gear, the host, and everyone in the space with professional respect. Damage caused during your session is your financial responsibility. Full expectations are in our Code of Conduct.
entryTerms.guests: Your booking covers you and the guests you listed during your application. Additional guests must be approved in advance. You are responsible for your guests' conduct.
entryTerms.content: What you create at Replay Club is yours. We don't claim rights to your recordings, sessions, or creative work. We may, with your explicit written permission, share content from your session on our channels — but only if you opt in.
entryTerms.liability: You are responsible for yourself and your guests on premises. Replay Club is not liable for lost personal items, injuries, or external technical issues outside our control. Full liability terms are in our Studio Policies.
entryTerms.questions: For any questions before or after your application, reach us at replayclubrecords@gmail.com.
entryTerms.agreement: By applying for a session, you agree to these terms, the Studio Policies, the Cancellation Policy, and the Code of Conduct.
entryTerms.agreeCheckbox: I agree to the <terms>Entry Terms</terms> and understand the cancellation policy.

cancel.title: Cancel Booking?
cancel.message: This action cannot be undone. Cancellations must be made at least 24 hours before your session. For refund inquiries, contact replayclubrecords@gmail.com.
cancel.confirmEmail: A confirmation email has been sent.

reschedule.title: Reschedule Session
reschedule.notice: Rescheduling requires at least 24 hours notice before your current session.
reschedule.confirmEmail: A confirmation email has been sent.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.description: Have questions about our rooms, equipment, or booking? Drop us a line and we'll get back to you.
